nasb.text: Why has my pain been perpetual And my wound incurable, refusing to be healed? Will You indeed be to me like a deceptive stream With water that is unreliable?

esv.text: Why is my pain unceasing, my wound incurable, refusing to be healed? Will you be to me like a deceitful brook, like waters that fail?

cnv.text: 我的痛苦為甚麼長久不止呢？ 我的創傷為甚麼無法醫治，不得痊愈呢？ 你對我真的像叫人失望、 靠不住的溪流嗎？

ccb.text: 为什么我的痛楚无休无止？ 为什么我的创伤无法医治？ 难道你要像一条时断时流的小溪让我无法依靠吗？
